infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: AutoAI uses speech recognition to let you describe car problems hands-free.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AutoAI uses your microphone to listen for car problem descriptions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AutoAI uses your photo library so you can upload photos of your vehicle or car problems to share with the community in posts and to set your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AutoAI uses your camera so you can take photos of parts you want to list for sale.
